headline: A Look At Southwest Airlines (LUV) Valuation As Energy And Security Pressures Hit Travel Outlook
summary: Soaring energy prices linked to the conflict in Iran and airport security disruptions tied to unpaid TSA workers are putting cost and demand pressures in focus for Southwest Airlines (LUV) and its shareholders. See our latest analysis for Southwest Airlines. At a share price of $37.36, Southwest’s recent performance reflects pressure, with a 25.12% 1 month share price return decline and a 9.54% year to date share price return decline, while the 1 year total shareholder return is 13.47%. This...

headline: New fees, fewer flights: Higher fuel prices pinch consumer budgets beyond the gas pump
summary: As corporate policies change, Americans will feel higher oil prices in their wallets beyond the gas pump.

headline: Pricy airfare, airport chaos test travelers' willingness to fly this year
summary: Travelers are weighing whether they'll fly later this year, considering higher airfares and airport chaos
